name: ÄIJÄ
overview: The comedy series "ÄIJÄ" begins when Tauno and his best friend Rasmus start seventh grade. Tauno realizes he seems like a childish wimp compared to others. He's in danger of becoming an unpopular outcast! Tauno starts a "dude channel" on social media, and even changes his name - now Tauno is TJ. The goal is to get into the school's popular, tough boys' gang, who even hang out in the school attic - as long as Rasmus doesn't mess the whole thing up.
